claude_commands_agents.note: synapse listed as 'squad' but is actually a command suite

critical_findings.title: Agent Duplication @ Scale (30 agents)
critical_findings.description: 30 agents appear in multiple squad folders simultaneously. Examples: aiox-cerebro in AIOX/ AND AIOX-Cerebro/, booth in AIOX/ AND Deep-Research/, etc.
critical_findings.impact: Framework coherence broken — which version loads? Inconsistent behavior across CLI activation paths.

locations.AIOX_agents: 40+ stub files (34 lines avg = header only)

critical_findings.title: Agent Divergence (same name, different content)
critical_findings.description: aiox-cerebro.md: AIOX/agents/ = 24 lines, AIOX-Cerebro/agents/ = 15 lines. DIVERGENT content.
critical_findings.impact: Cannot determine which is canonical. Diff shows substantial differences — activation behavior undefined.
critical_findings.example: aiox-cerebro: AIOX/ has full YAML, AIOX-Cerebro/ is shorter (likely stub)

critical_findings.title: Stub Architecture (0/40 agents have ACTIVATION-NOTICE)
critical_findings.description: AIOX/agents/ contains 40+ stub files — none have ACTIVATION-NOTICE frontmatter. No activation instructions = cannot execute.
critical_findings.impact: AIOX/agents/ is dead code. Cannot be activated via any CLI path. Inflates agent count metrics.

critical_findings.title: AIOX/ Mega-Folder Pattern (mirror of all squads)
critical_findings.description: AIOX/ folder duplicates agents from every squad: AIOX-Cerebro, Deep-Research, Claude-Code-Mastery, Copy, System-Factory, Squad-Creator. Appears to be a 'monorepo view' of all agents.
critical_findings.impact: Confusion on source of truth. Updates must be synced across 2+ locations. Risk of divergence (which we already found).
critical_findings.architectural_question: Is AIOX/ intentional mirror (needs sync process) or accidental duplication (needs cleanup)?

critical_findings.title: No Hook Health Check (from Cont 36 findings)
critical_findings.description: Cont 36 found pre-tool-use-validator.cjs was dead (silently no-op). No systematic health check on hook invocability.
critical_findings.impact: Unknown number of other dead hooks. Reported 60% coverage; actual ~22%. Same risk in AIOX/ agents.
critical_findings.recommendation: Audit all .cjs hooks for actual invocability (not just existence)

aiox_core.reason: constitution.md exists, core structure good, but dead-code pattern (pre-tool-use-validator) suggests integrity issue

squads.reason: 8 squads mapped, but agent divergence between folders and stub patterns reduce confidence

claude_config.reason: agents exist but 30 are duplicated with divergent content; 0/40 AIOX/ agents are activatable

wiring.reason: AIOX/agents/ mirror breaks activation routing; unclear which agent version loads; no .aiox-sync.yaml (from Cont 36)

top_3_actions.description: Determine if AIOX/agents/ is intentional mirror (monorepo view) or accidental duplication. If intentional, document sync process and enforce. If accidental, delete.
Delete all 40+ stub agent files from AIOX/agents/ if not intentional mirror. If intentional, convert to activation-capable files or remove (currently 0% useful).
top_3_actions.command: rm -rf .claude/commands/AIOX/agents/ OR populate with canonical copies (story required)

top_3_actions.description: For each duplicated agent: identify canonical version, delete all others. Example: aiox-cerebro.md should exist ONLY in one location.
top_3_actions.command: for agent in {list}; do diff -u AIOX/agents/$agent AIOX-Cerebro/agents/$agent > /tmp/agent-diffs.txt; done

coherence_score_components.agent_canonicality: FAIL — 30 agents in multiple locations, 0 with verified canonical source
coherence_score_components.dead_code_presence: FAIL — 40+ stub agents + pre-tool-use-validator.cjs pattern suggests broader issue
coherence_score_components.documentation_clarity: PARTIAL — Constitution exists, but agent duplication creates confusion
coherence_score_components.wiring_integrity: FAIL — No clear activation routing; AIOX/ stubs break CLI path resolution
coherence_score_components.framework_coherence_rating: D (50/100) — Major structural issues, unclear intent, dead code, divergence

findings_shared: Dead code pattern (pre-tool-use-validator in Cont 36, AIOX/agents stubs in Cont 37)
Fragmentation (EPIC-1 ID collision in Cont 36, agent duplication in Cont 37)
Documentation gaps (spec contradiction in Cont 36, unclear AIOX/ intent in Cont 37)
comparison_to_cont36.new_severity: CONT37 > CONT36: Agent duplication affects core activation path; Cont 36 was specific to hooks
comparison_to_cont36.pattern: Framework coherence deteriorating across layers — suggests systematic design review needed

next_steps.immediate: BLOCK until AIOX/ folder intent is clarified
session_cont37: 1. @aiox-master decision: AIOX/ mirror — keep or delete?
2. If delete: @devops removes + updates any paths referencing AIOX/agents/
3. If keep: @aiox-master creates SYNC-AIOX.md documenting master copy locations + sync process
session_cont38: Systematic dead-code audit: all .cjs hooks + all .md agents + all .js scripts
Framework health check: write automated script to verify all agents are activatable

audit_confidence: 95% (all findings verified via local filesystem reading, not estimated)
